bottom_10_values: Electroencephalographic Report    Procedure: Routine EEG    EEG description:    Background: In the awake state, a well-defined posterior background rhythm of 8.5 Hz was recorded in the occipital regions bilaterally. The posterior background rhythm attenuated with eye opening and enhanced with eye closure.     Other background activity: NA    Hyperventilation was not performed.     Photic stimulation produced a symmetrical bi-occipital driving response.     Drowsiness: Present    Sleep: Stage 2 sleep was attempted but not observed.
